title: Tombpunk - A Look at this Deluxe RPG Starter Set
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=skABNIsQ3fA

Daniel (@dungeondive) cracks open **Tombpunk: The Mausoleum Edition**, Alan Bar's deluxe box set that channels Mörk Borg energy while doing its own thing.

The game's dedicated to John Blanche—the legendary Games Workshop artist whose stippling and cross-hatching shaped grimdark aesthetics for decades. Daniel takes a detour through his Voodoo Forest art book, which is worth the tangent. Mechanics-wise, it's a d12 roll-low system with a resource economy where coins actually matter: you pay tax just to keep existing in this dying world.

The box includes wooden meeples, metal coins, and a bookmark chunky enough to deal d10 damage. Whether Tombpunk grows a third-party ecosystem like Mörk Borg remains to be seen.

----

*Anyone taken Tombpunk for a solo spin? Share your tales of grimdark economic hardship.*
